prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-BEGPOTARTKIT-24PC-BUN Product Type: ART_SUPPLIES Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Complete Pottery Tools Kit Sculpting Polymer Clay Art Supplies, 24pc Description: The ToolTreaux Beginners Pottery Tools Kit includes all the essential pieces for working with a wide variety of soft mediums. Many of the sculpting tools offer double sided heads, reducing the number of tools needed but simultaneously, enabling you to reach for a wide variety of different carving, sculpting and finishing instruments to create and experiment with. The set of tools within this beginner's kit is made up of 24 pieces.

The kit includes the following components:

- 4 FL oz Snifter Bottle: Used for cleaning work surfaces and maintain pliable materials

- Storage pouches for all tools

- X4 full stainless steel grooved-handles double-ended tools

- X11 double-sided wood handle and steel-ended tools: Curved flat fork tool, curved flat tool, curved needle point tool, curved medium spear head tool, curved large spear head tool, curved loop tool, angled needle point tool, small fork spear head tool, salt and pepper drill tool, spoolie tool and metal wire brush

- X8 traditional pottery tools: Loop for removing clay, double-ended ribbon tool For cutting, slicing and shaping, needle tool to cut clay strips or holes, design work of placing objects, potter rib for shaping and smoothing, modeling tool for cutting, smoothing, contouring and decorating, a metal scraper for shaping and trimming, a sponge for wetting surface and smoothing and a wire clay cutter for slicing clay or trimming pots and other objects

The pottery sculpting ceramic tools have a variety of different carving shapes to provide greater flexibility when attempting different techniques, designs and textures. The lightweight and comfortable design of the tools combined with the variety makes it easy to work with when removing blemishes from the surface of clay. The components are made with high-quality steel and polished hardwoods to ensure comfortable handling and years of productive use. Search Terms: art supplies ceramics pottery tools clay wax creative hobby craft sculpting painting stainless steel carving mud putty plaster kit studio school soft mediums snifter bottle utility workshop kids adults design creativity potters rib wire cutter Features: - 24PC POTTERY TOOLS KIT: All the most sought after tools for any beginner or novice ceramist can be found in this creative set; the 24pc pottery tools kit is comprised of a wide variety of options for multiple mediums, whether carving, shaping, modeling, cutting, scraping, brushing, smoothing and more - EASY TO USE TOOLS: The pottery tool kit provides you with lightweight tools that allow for fine detailing, accuracy and efficiency without tiring hands; the double sided design of many of the tools allows you to reach for over 35 different options without taking up additional space - DURABLE MATERIALS: All the metal tipped sculpting tools are made of quality steel and stainless steel to ensure they won't bend or break under pressure and from repeated use; the wooden handles are smoothly finished, allowing for comfort, precision and easy handling - CERAMIC SCULPTING KIT INCLUDES: snifter bottle, 4 double sided full stainless steel carving tools with grooved handles and storage pouch, 11 wood handled and stainless steel tipped carving tools with resealable case, 8pc collection of pottery specific tools, metal scraper, sponge, wire clay cutter and storage bag - SPECIFICATIONS: Snifter Bottle Dimensions: 5.25 x 2 inches, 4FL oz; Full Stainless Steel Tools Length: 6.25 to 7 inches; Wood and Steel-Ended Tools Dimensions: 5 x 10.1 x 4.8 inches; Materials: wood, stainless steel, steel, plastic; Colors: Assorted === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 24-pc Pottery Tools Kit Sculpting Clay

anthropic.title_differentiation: Double-Sided Tools, Stainless Steel And Wood Handles, Includes Snifter Bottle, Storage Pouches, Beginner To Advanced

openai.title_differentiation: 24-Piece Beginner Set, Double Sided Steel Tools, Hardwood Handles, Snifter Bottle, Pouch Included
